heading: Funds for specific and authorized projects merged with and accounted for under regular annual appropriation
label: 701f–2 Funds for specific and authorized projects merged with and accounted for under regular annual appropriation
text: Funds on and after , appropriated for a specific and heretofore authorized project for a river, harbor, or flood-control works shall be merged with and be accounted for under the regular annual appropriation title applicable to such item.May 17, 1950
